candidates.why: Includes short-term investments, broader than cash and cash equivalents.

Includes short-term investments, not preferred for CHE.
Not cash.

candidates.why: Section header for current liabilities, but not the reported total amount line.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Exact reported total current liabilities line.
Wrong maturity bucket.

Wrong maturity bucket and only a component.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean total for current debt and current portion of long-term debt; best match for STD.
Component of short-term debt only; incomplete if clean combined total exists.
Current maturities component; useful only if no clean total exists.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Chose the clean combined current debt total and avoided adding components that would double count. Although a lease-excluded line exists for only part of the series, no consistent clean current-borrowings-ex-lease total is available in the shortlist or preview, so this is the best reported STD proxy.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liability line on the balance sheet.
Includes noncurrent and current taxes; less precise than current-only payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because no TXP candidates were provided, but this exact current tax payable label is clearly present and appropriate.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Gross PPE, less preferred than net total.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Priority list uses net total PPE labels; the first is preferred, the second is a valid alternate label across periods.
